**Assigning Content Editing Permissions**

eBird Hotspot Editors go to <https://review.ebird.org/review/hotspots/manage-access> OR navigate to any Hotspot in your assigned region and tap About \> Review \> Manage Access.  

You will need to know the eBird User ID of the account—this is different than their username. User IDs are formatted as USER123456

If you are not sure of the person’s User ID: 

1.  Go to [search.macaulaylibrary.org](http://search.macaulaylibrary.org) 

2.  Tap Contributor, type their name\*, and tap when it appears in the dropdown

3.  Their UserID will be displayed in the resulting webpage address (e.g., <https://search.macaulaylibrary.org/catalog?userId=USER123456>) 

\* If multiple accounts share the same name, you may need to ask the account holder to perform these steps, repeating Step 2 as necessary  until the correct account is selected (process of elimination). 

If you still can’t figure out the name, any eBird observation reviewer can see this by clicking on the user’s name from the Review Tools.
